species: Notably, ferroptosis is implicated in pathological cell death in neurodegenerative diseases such as PD. Moreover, SH-SY5Y is a widely used cell line in PD because it functions as a dopaminergic neuron.
cell_type: HSPA4 restrains transferrin in dopaminergic neurons to attenuate ferroptosis in a Parkinson’s disease model.
disease_state: HSPA4 restrains transferrin in dopaminergic neurons to attenuate ferroptosis in a Parkinson’s disease model.
sample_source: To further confirm these findings, we prepared primary dopaminergic neurons and examined the protective effects of HSPA4.
age: In this study, primary dopaminergic neurons were cultured using cerebral tissues obtained from SPF-grade Sprague-Dawley fetal rats at embryonic days 14–18.
cell_line: Moreover, SH-SY5Y is a widely used cell line in PD because it functions as a dopaminergic neuron.
strain: In this study, primary dopaminergic neurons were cultured using cerebral tissues obtained from SPF-grade Sprague-Dawley fetal rats at embryonic days 14–18.
